status: complete — pending Amit approval to commit
context: Decifer has a 9-dimension signal composite with static equal-weighting. Research consensus is that momentum dominates in low-vol bull regimes and mean-reversion dominates in high-vol choppy regimes. This session implements the P1 Regime-Gated Router to make the signal model context-aware.
work_completed: config.py: 4 new keys — regime_routing_enabled (True), regime_router_vix_threshold (20), regime_router_momentum_mult (1.3), regime_router_reversion_mult (0.7)
signals.py: get_market_regime_vix() — fetches ^VIX, returns {regime, vix, source}
signals.py: _regime_multipliers(regime_router) — returns per-dim multiplier dict; all 1.0 when flag off or regime unknown
signals.py: compute_confluence() — accepts regime_router param; multipliers applied to each of 9 dimensions before score accumulation; regime_router echoed in return dict
signals.py: _fetch_one_process, fetch_multi_timeframe, score_universe — regime_router threaded through the full call chain; score_universe fetches VIX itself only when not provided by caller
bot.py: computes router state from already-fetched VIX (no second network call), logs it, passes to score_universe
dashboard.py: updateRegime() JS shows 'ROUTER: MOMENTUM' or 'ROUTER: MEAN-REVERSION' in regime meta line
tests/test_regime_router.py: 19 unit tests written and passing
key_decisions: VIX dedup: bot.py reuses VIX from scanner.get_market_regime() — no second fetch per cycle. score_universe() accepts regime_router=str param to skip its own fetch when called from bot.
Multipliers applied to adjusted score variables in-place (not raw), so score_breakdown reflects what actually contributed to the total.
News/Social are neutral dims (1.0x in all regimes) — they measure event-driven sentiment, not regime-dependent momentum/reversion.
Fallback on VIX fetch failure → 'momentum' (safe default: prefers participating in a trend over sitting out).
Score cap at 50 unchanged — 1.3x multiplier may push past, cap handles it.
next_steps: Amit to approve and commit with format: feat(signals): regime-gated momentum/mean-reversion router
Monitor regime_router state in dashboard over 1-2 weeks of paper trading
After 50+ additional trades, compare IC and win-rate between momentum vs mean_reversion regime cycles
A/B test: set regime_routing_enabled=False for a week, compare PnL
